tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
A O is a pirate captain from the New World.

He leads the A O Pirates with authority.

He was allied under Whitebeard’s command.

He participated in the Marineford War.

He is known as a loyal subordinate pirate.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Captain of A O Pirates
  • Allied with Whitebeard
  • Fought in Marineford War
  • Operates in New World

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:

tab1.title: Description

Absalom is a commander of the Thriller Bark Pirates.

tab2.title: Abilities

• Invisibility
  • Stealth
  • Physical Strength
  • Durability
  • Gun Combat
  • Modified Body Enhancements
  • Speed
  • Combat Skills
  • Endurance
  • Surprise Attacks

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:

  • Thriller Bark Commander
  • Has animal modifications
  • Enemy of Straw Hats

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Blackbeard is a dangerous pirate.

He seeks power and chaos.

He controls darkness.

He is one of the Yonko.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Yonko
  • Dangerous pirate
  • Seeks power
  • Main villain

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Monkey D. Luffy is the captain of the Straw Hat Pirates who dreams of becoming the Pirate King.

He gained rubber powers after eating a Devil Fruit.

Luffy is fearless, cheerful, and values his friends above everything.

He travels the seas in search of the legendary treasure One Piece.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Rubber Body
  • Gum-Gum Pistol
  • Gear Second
  • Gear Third
  • Gear Fourth
  • Super Strength
  • High Speed
  • Durability
  • Observation Haki
  • Armament Haki
  • Conqueror’s Haki
  • Combat Instinct
  • Endurance
  • Elastic Attacks
  • Battle Creativity

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Captain of Straw Hat Pirates
  • Wants to become Pirate King
  • Inspired by Shanks
  • Has a straw hat as his symbol
  • Loves meat

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Nami is the navigator of the Straw Hat crew.

She is skilled in weather prediction.

She loves money.

She is very intelligent.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Loves money
  • Navigator
  • Smartest crew member
  • Controls weather

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Robin is the archaeologist of the crew.

She can grow body parts anywhere.

She seeks true history.

She is calm and intelligent.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Archaeologist
  • Survivor of Ohara
  • Reads poneglyphs
  • Calm personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Nin is a member of the zombie trio.

He serves Gecko Moria.

He has a triangular head shape.

He works with Gyoro and Bao.

He appears in Thriller Bark.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Zombie trio member
  • Thriller Bark
  • Serves Moria
  • Unique design

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Ace is Luffy’s brother and a powerful pirate.

He serves under Whitebeard.

He controls fire using his Devil Fruit.

He is brave and loyal.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Luffy’s brother
  • Son of Roger
  • Fire powers
  • Loyal pirate

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Zoro is a master swordsman and Luffy’s right-hand man.

He aims to become the greatest swordsman.

He uses three-sword style.

He is extremely loyal.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content:
• Three Sword Style
  • Super Strength
  • Endurance
  • Sword Mastery
  • Speed
  • Armament Haki
  • Observation Haki
  • Durability
  • Combat Skills
  • Focus

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Gets lost easily
  • Loyal to Luffy
  • Uses 3 swords
  • Dreams to be strongest swordsman

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sabo is Luffy’s brother and revolutionary leader.

He inherited Ace’s fire powers.

He fights for freedom.

He is powerful and intelligent.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Luffy’s brother
  • Revolutionary leader
  • Inherited Ace’s fruit
  • Strong fighter

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Sanji is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates.

He fights using powerful kicks.

He respects women deeply.

He dreams of finding All Blue.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Cook of crew
  • Loves women
  • Won’t hit females
  • Dream: All Blue

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Apoo is a music-based pirate.

He uses sound attacks.

He is unpredictable.

He is part of Worst Generation.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Music fighter
  • Worst Generation
  • Sound powers
  • Unpredictable

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Shanks is one of the Four Emperors.

He inspired Luffy to become a pirate.

He is calm but extremely powerful.

He values balance in the world.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Yonko
  • Inspired Luffy
  • Lost arm
  • Strong haki user

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Rayleigh is the former vice captain of Roger Pirates.

He is extremely powerful.

He trained Luffy.

He is calm and wise.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Roger’s partner
  • Luffy’s teacher
  • Legendary pirate
  • Master of haki

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Smoker is a Marine officer.

He hunts pirates.

He controls smoke.

He has strong justice beliefs.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Marine officer
  • Chases Luffy
  • Uses jitte
  • Justice driven

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Chopper is the doctor of the crew.

He is a reindeer who ate a Devil Fruit.

He can transform into human forms.

He is kind and caring.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Reindeer doctor
  • Very cute
  • Loyal friend
  • Hates compliments

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Law is the captain of Heart Pirates.

He is a skilled doctor.

He is calm and strategic.

He is part of the Worst Generation.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Doctor pirate
  • Heart Pirates captain
  • Uses Room
  • Calm personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Urouge is a monk-like pirate.

He gains power from damage.

He is physically strong.

He is calm and confident.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Monk pirate
  • Strong body
  • Worst Generation
  • Calm personality

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Usopp is the sniper of the crew.

He is creative and resourceful.

He often lies but becomes brave in battle.

He dreams of being a great warrior.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Great liar
  • Sniper
  • Brave warrior dream
  • Inventor

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content:
Drake is a pirate and former Marine.

He can transform into a dinosaur.

He is part of the Worst Generation.

He is strong and strategic.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content:
• Worst Generation
  • Former Marine
  • Dinosaur powers
  • Captain
